personal.name: Appugouda B Patil
personal.title: AWS Cloud Solutions Architect
personal.bio: Seasoned AWS Solutions Architect with 18 years of experience designing and delivering cloud-native, serverless, and event-driven architectures across AWS and hybrid environments. Expert in Well-Architected Framework, cost optimization, multi-region deployments, and digital transformation solutions.

about.summary: I am a results-driven AWS Solutions Architect with deep expertise in building scalable, fault-tolerant, and secure systems using AWS-native and hybrid architectures. I specialize in cloud migration, event-driven and serverless solutions, stakeholder engagement, and leading cross-functional teams to deliver business-aligned, cost-optimized architectures.

experience.description: Delivered scalable and secure AWS solutions for Education, Retail, and Location-Based Services clients, achieving 35% cost savings. Implemented RESTful APIs, advanced IAM security, and mentored junior architects toward AWS certifications.

Led cloud transformation for Healthcare and EduTech clients, designed serverless data workflows, identity verification systems, and security-compliant architectures. Managed 15+ member cross-functional teams and boosted go-to-market by 30% through platform innovation.

Modernized logistics platforms with cloud-native patterns, reducing operational costs by 40%. Established CI/CD pipelines with AWS CodePipeline and Docker, cutting release cycles by 30% while ensuring business alignment.

Executed AWS cloud-native prototypes, built mobile-first POCs, and delivered full lifecycle development for enterprise applications. Recognized with the Best Techwork Award for 'Outlook Meeting Manager' project.

education.school: B.M.S. College of Engineering, Bengaluru (Visvesvaraya Technological University)

projects.title: EduTech Identity Verification System
projects.description: Designed and implemented a secure user onboarding and RBAC system using AWS Cognito, Lambda, API Gateway, and S3, improving onboarding efficiency by 60%.

projects.title: Serverless Data Integration Workflow
projects.description: Automated ETL pipeline leveraging AWS Step Functions, Glue, Lambda, and S3, achieving 70% cost reduction and improved operational efficiency.

projects.title: Gig-Work Platform
projects.description: Directed cross-functional teams to build a scalable gig-work platform from scratch, improving time-to-market by 30% and enabling high availability with AWS cloud-native services.

achievements.title: AWS Certified Solutions Architect - Associate
achievements.description: Validated expertise in designing and implementing distributed systems on AWS.

achievements.title: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
achievements.description: Demonstrated foundational AWS knowledge covering core services, billing, and security concepts.

achievements.title: Best Mentor Award
achievements.description: Recognized for mentoring junior engineers and accelerating their AWS certification readiness at Goavega Software Solutions.

achievements.title: Best Techwork Award
achievements.description: Awarded for 'Outlook Meeting Manager' project at Mindtree Ltd.

testimonials.name: Engineering Manager
testimonials.content: Appugouda delivered highly secure and scalable AWS solutions, reducing costs while improving system reliability. His leadership and architectural vision were key to our success.

testimonials.name: CEO
testimonials.content: Appugouda’s AWS-native architecture accelerated our product launch and enabled significant revenue growth. His ability to mentor our engineers made a long-term impact.

testimonials.name: CTO
testimonials.content: He modernized our legacy systems into cloud-native platforms, reducing costs by 40% and streamlining operations. A true partner in digital transformation.
